policy_text: Perishable food items are non-refundable once delivered and only food items are eligible for refund. Refunds are only provided if wrong or expired items are delivered.only food will get refund.
Sportswear can be returned within 10 days if unused and only clothing items will get refund. Items showing signs of wear or washing are not eligible for refund.
Subscription services are non-refundable once activated. Cancellation will stop future billing but no refund for current cycle.
Refunds for laptops are only allowed within 7 days if the product has hardware failure and electronic items will get refund. Software issues are not covered under return policy.
Books can be returned within 7 days if they are damaged or incorrect. No refund for books with normal wear after reading.
Ethnic wear can be returned within 5 days if unused and in original condition and only clothing items are eligible. Altered or customized items are not refundable.
Large appliances like refrigerators and washing machines are eligible for replacement within 10 days if defective and only home appliances are eligible. Refunds are subject to inspection report.
